title: adhatoda moretiana
intro: Adhatoda moretiana, also known as Vasa or Malabar nut, is a plant species native to India, Sri Lanka, and other parts of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Adhatoda moretiana include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and acting as an antioxidant to protect the body from free radicals. Adhatoda moretiana is often used in herbal preparations such as tea, decoctions, and capsules, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
